David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: French Girl
programme.desc: Gordon, a high school teacher from Brooklyn, goes with his girlfriend and chef Sophie to her hometown of Quebec City, where she is testing for the Michelin 3-star restaurant of Ruby Collins.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: Former baseball player Ray Waller moves into a new home with his family. But a dark secret in the home's past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family into the depths of terror.

programme.title: Strange Way of Life
programme.desc: After 25 years, Silva rides a horse across the desert to visit his friend Sheriff Jake. They celebrate the meeting, but the next morning Jake tells him the reason for his trip.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a private security gig for a journalist as she interviews a ruthless dictator. When a military coup breaks out, the trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, the assassins, and each other.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: As Arthur Curry confronts the responsibilities of being King of the Seven Seas, a long-buried ancient power is unleashed. After witnessing the full effect of these dark forces, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an old enemy, and embark on a treacherous journey to protect his family, his kingdom, and the world from irreversible devastation.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called "The Plastics". However, when Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend, she finds herself in Regina's crosshairs. She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: YOLO
programme.desc: China. After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: Cecilia, a woman of devout faith, is warmly welcomed to the picture-perfect Italian countryside where she is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But it becomes clear to Cecilia that her new home harbors dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Oprah and the Color Purple Journey
programme.desc: In this exclusive behind-the-scenes documentary look at the anticipated new musical adaptation of The Color Purple, Academy Award-nominee Oprah Winfrey goes on location to the Georgia set to give audiences unprecedented access to the making of the new film.

programme.title: Rock Hudson: All The Heaven Allowed
programme.desc: The biography of renowned actor Rock Hudson is examined in this relevant investigation of Hollywood and LGBTQ+ identity, from his public 'ladies' man' character to his private life as a gay man.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Christmas Hotel
programme.desc: Erin grew up in the small town of Mt Holly but always dreamt of living in a big city. Her first job - working the desk at the Mt Holly Inn - started her on a path to New York where she now works at the prestigious Windsor Hotel. When her boss tells her she will receive a promotion if she can pull off a big project, she is thrilled - until she realises the project is in her hometown. Erin returns home to discover that the locals don't appreciate their precious Mt. Holly Inn being bought out by a big corporation. And heading up the charge? Erin's ex-boyfriend Conner. But when several hotel staff members come down with the flu, Erin is forced to enlist Conner's help with hotel's Christmas events. As they two re-establish their relationship, Erin has to figure out if what she really wants is a promotion or to be home again.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: The Christmas Pact
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question next door neighbours Sadie and Ben will answer as they keep the spirit of Christmas and the magic of their childhood pact alive! When they were eight years old, they planted a scrawny 3-foot tall Christmas tree behind their church and the Christmas Pact began. But as life gets in the way the pact is threatened to be broken. Ben and Sadie need some Christmas Magic to recommit to each other and promise to keep their special holiday traditions. With each Christmas that passes by, Ben and Sadie's Christmas tree grows taller and stronger; and so does their love. The pact bearing fruit to the magic of Christmas and the undeniable answer. Yes, friends can fall in love! love!

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: 100 years ago, a strip of Santa's magical jingle bells were discovered by a young boy in Pleasant Bay, Oregon, bringing about a century of prosperity and peace for the small town. Now, just days before Christmas, the bells are missing, and it's up to a group of intrepid kids to solve the case, find the bells and restore the Christmas magic.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: 100 years ago, a strip of Santa's magical jingle bells were discovered by a young boy in Pleasant Bay, Oregon, bringing about a century of prosperity and peace for the small town. Now, just days before Christmas, the bells are missing, and it's up to a group of intrepid kids to solve the case, find the bells and restore the Christmas magic.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a young, up-and-coming film-maker in Hollywood, has made a name for herself directing Christmas movies. When handsome network executive Christopher shows up threatening to halt production on her latest movie, Jessica's assistant, Reena, points out the irony: Jessica isn't just trying to save her Christmas movie, she's actually living in one. Jessica must now juggle all the classic tropes - her actors falling in and out of love, a wayward elf dog, and her own stirring romantic feelings for her perceived nemesis - in order to get her movie and her life to their happy endings.

programme.title: Holiday in your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with the decision of leaving Nashville to be by her grandmother's bedside or to perform in the concert before returning home. Her musical inspiration, Faith Shawn, helps her to realize the importance of family.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: A Savage Christmas
programme.desc: After years of estrangement, transwoman Davina Savage returns for Christmas. Expecting her transition to be the focus, it's overshadowed by family secrets which threaten another Christmas lunch.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: When two kids find a hoard of cash, it looks like Christmas has come early - until the crooks who counterfeited the money go after them.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: While uncovering who is behind the random acts of Christmas popping up around her city, a journalist meets a competing reporter who captures her heart.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a young, up-and-coming film-maker in Hollywood, has made a name for herself directing Christmas movies. When handsome network executive Christopher shows up threatening to halt production on her latest movie, Jessica's assistant, Reena, points out the irony: Jessica isn't just trying to save her Christmas movie, she's actually living in one. Jessica must now juggle all the classic tropes - her actors falling in and out of love, a wayward elf dog, and her own stirring romantic feelings for her perceived nemesis - in order to get her movie and her life to their happy endings.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: In 1964 Connecticut, 10 year old Felix's holiday season is spiced up by the sudden arrivals of a substitute teacher and a feisty Russian student. Based on the bestseller by Wally Lamb.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: A lonely cat living in a mall pet shop develops a sour outlook on life until, in the midst of the holiday rush, she meets a very special 12-year-old girl.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF disbanded, and Ethan out in the cold, the team now faces off against a network of highly skilled special agents, the Syndicate. These highly-trained operatives are hell-bent on creating a new world order through an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with disavowed British agent Ilsa Faust, who may or may not be a member of this rogue nation, as the group faces their most impossible mission yet.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth
programme.desc: After a career spanning 40 years, Tom Cruise does not seem to have developed one wrinkle. His legendary smile has dominated many blockbuster productions. This film will try to unveil the man behind the film icon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed deep beneath the desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day. Her malevolence has grown over millennia and with it come terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: An idealistic young American proudly enlists during the Vietnam War and returns home a quadriplegic. Struggling to overcome drug addiction and depression, he turns his life around and becomes an outspoken critic of the war. Based on the true story of Ron Kovic.

programme.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth
programme.desc: After a career spanning 40 years, Tom Cruise does not seem to have developed one wrinkle. His legendary smile has dominated many blockbuster productions. This film will try to unveil the man behind the film icon.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor plunges into an erotic foray that threatens his marriage, and may ensnare him in a murder mystery, after his wife's admission of sexual longings. The story sweeps from doubt and fear to self-discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth
programme.desc: After a career spanning 40 years, Tom Cruise does not seem to have developed one wrinkle. His legendary smile has dominated many blockbuster productions. This film will try to unveil the man behind the film icon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper is the lone security repairman stationed on a desolate, nearly-ruined future Earth. When he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft, her arrival triggers a nonstop chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows, and leaves humanity's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and little to show for it. Now, Max has to transport Vincent to his next job, one night, five stops, five hits and one getaway. And after this fateful night, neither man will ever be the same again. Tonight everything is changing.

programme.title: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: The story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Joan Jett, Journey, Foreigner, Bon Jovi, and more.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.desc: Thought safely entombed deep beneath the desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day. Her malevolence has grown over millennia and with it come terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: The Last Samurai
programme.desc: Set in Japan during the 1870s, this film tells the story of Capt Nathan Algren, a respected American military officer hired by the Emperor of Japan to train the country's first army in the art of modern warfare. The Emperor plans to wipe out the ancient Imperial Samurai warriors for more Westernised ways, but Algren finds himself unexpectedly affected and influenced by his contact with the Samurai, which places him at the centre of a struggle between two worlds, with only his own sense of honour and justice to guide him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise's stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor plunges into an erotic foray that threatens his marriage, and may ensnare him in a murder mystery, after his wife's admission of sexual longings. The story sweeps from doubt and fear to self-discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise's stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: An idealistic young American proudly enlists during the Vietnam War and returns home a quadriplegic. Struggling to overcome drug addiction and depression, he turns his life around and becomes an outspoken critic of the war. Based on the true story of Ron Kovic.

programme.title: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: The story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Joan Jett, Journey, Foreigner, Bon Jovi, and more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise's stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire
programme.desc: A full-blooded insight into the centuries-old relationship between a regal vampire and his immortal victim, told through an interview with a journalist.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: TMNT: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. They take on a crime syndicate, but soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A projectionist allows 11-year-old boy Danny to a private midnight preview of the latest movie featuring his idol and superhero, Jack Slater. A magic ticket transports the boy into the film, where he helps his hero chase the baddie, who in turn breaks through the screen to wreak havoc in real-life, with the help of an evil sidekick.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: The flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level in The Angry Birds Movie 2! When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb, and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck's sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney, and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely super-team to save their homes.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: St Trinian's
programme.desc: The hilarious antics and girl-power action return as the 'young ladies' of the infamous school St Trinian's face its closure once more as dire financial problems set in. Headmistress Camilla Fritton is threatened, not only by the bank but her unorthodox doctrine of free expression and self-empowerment has drawn the attention of education minister Geoffrey Thwaites. Even though he's an old flame of Camilla's, right now he's determined to bring discipline and order to the anarchic school. However those smart and fearless St Trinian's girls are determined to defend the school they love to the end.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: Dive into the undersea sensation! After King Neptune's crown is stolen and Mr Krabs is accused of the crime, SpongeBob and Patrick set out on a danger-ridden, hilarity-filled adventure to retrieve the crown and save Mr Krabs.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: PAW PATROL: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: A meteor crash gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into the Mighty Pups. But things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger breaks out of jail to steal their superpowers.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Tim Templeton suddenly finds his share of parental love plummeting when his new baby brother arrives - wearing a suit and toting a briefcase - and makes it clear to everyone that he's in charge. But when Tim discovers that Boss Baby is on a secret mission, he reluctantly agrees to team up with his pint-sized sibling for an epic adventure that might just change the world!

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: Pubert, the Addams' new baby, is in danger of being sabotaged by Wednesday and Puggsley, until Morticia and Gomez hire a nanny, Debbie, who marries Fester and tries to murder him for his money.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Mermaids
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need your help to save Mermaid Kingdom from a mean, garbage-dumping Octopus by bringing a magical mermaid crown back to Mariana the Mermaid. But how will Dora get to Mermaid Kingdom?

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Hold on to your berets, the Rugrats kids are headed for Paris. France doesn't stand a chance. When Stu Pickles is summoned to work at EuroReptarland, Paris's newest amusement park, the Rugrats kids tag along. From the Eiffel Tower to Notre Dame, no attraction is safe from the Rugrats who find that fun is the same in any language. Meanwhile, love is in the air for Chuckie's dad, Chas. Could Chuckie be getting a new mum? The Rugrats learn valuable lessons in courage, loyalty and true love in this music-filled journey.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: While the chickens on evil Mrs Tweedy's farm dream of a better life, a clever hen named Ginger is hatching plans to fly the coop for good. The only problem is, chickens can't fly or can they? Every escape attempt goes fowl until Rocky, a smooth-talking All-American rooster, crash-lands into the coop. It's hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her fine feathered friends to fly but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom! Featuring unforgettable characters, incredible animation and all-star voice talent, this instant classic from the academy Award-winning creators of Wallace & Gromit is eggs-traordinary fun for the whole family!

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: TMNT: Out Of The Shadows
programme.desc: Your favourite pizza loving turtles Michelangelo, Donatello, Leonardo and Raphael are back in the non-stop action adventure that is fun from start to finish! After super villain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with two mutant henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Tad And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad dreams of becoming an archaeologist traveling the world, uncovering hidden secrets and lost treasure, but his job working construction keeps him daydreaming instead of exploring. The chance of a lifetime comes when he is invited to attend archaeologist Sara Loavrof's presentation of her latest discovery, the papyrus that proves the existence of the Necklace of Midas, the legendary King who turned everything he touched into solid gold. When an evil billionaire forces Sara to help him find the enchanted talisman, Tad must rescue the girl of his dreams on a trip around the world, in this new hilarious, action-packed adventure the whole family will love!

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie
programme.desc: Hang on to your diapers! The Rugrats babies, intrepid explorers and stars of the wildly-popular animated series, are off on their first feature-length adventure. With the birth of his new baby brother Dylan, Tommy Pickles knew things were about to change, but he never expected that being a big brother could be such an adventure. While attempting to return Dil to 'hopsical', the Rugrats commandeer the Reptar Wagon and inadvertently get lost in the forest. It's a rollicking, musical ride into a world beyond their backyard as the Rugrats encounter obstacles and some big surprises in their quest to get back home.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures defeating world-class villains with his unmatched courage and mad martial arts skills, Po, the Dragon Warrior (Golden Globe nominee Jack Black), is called upon by destiny to give it a rest already. More specifically, he's tapped to become the Spiritual Leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
programme.desc: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers! The heroic MIGHTY PUPS are on a roll to super-save the day!

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends, Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape with the help of some prodigious penguins to explore the world.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure
programme.desc: When Danny twists the key of a dusty science fiction game, he unleashes a localised meteor shower that sends Danny's house and his brother, Walter, and sister, Lisa, into orbit around a distant ringed planet. Soon a defective robot, a rangy astronaut, and an alien spaceship enter the picture. Only by completing the game can the kids return their house to its proper space-time coordinates, but some nasty, carnivorous lizards have other ideas.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Jet To The Rescue
programme.desc: When the scheming Duke of Flappington steals a powerful levitation gem from the royal castle and uses its magical powers to raise Barkingburg into the clouds, Skye will need to overcome her fears and lead the team in their biggest aerial rescue yet!

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Curious George: Go West, Go Wild
programme.desc: Follows George and Ted as they travel to cousin Ginny's farm for a relaxing outdoor weekend, but plans take a turn when her farm animals escape.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: Rango is an ordinary chameleon who accidentally winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in desperate need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood thought he saved the world when he destroyed his most infamous invention - a machine that turned water into food causing cheeseburger rain and spaghetti tornadoes. But Flint soon learns that his invention survived and is now combining food and animals to create 'foodimals'! Flint and his friends embark on an adventurously mouth-watering mission to battle hungry tacodiles, shrimpanzees, hippotatomuses, cheesepiders and other foodimals to save the world - again!

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A projectionist allows 11-year-old boy Danny to a private midnight preview of the latest movie featuring his idol and superhero, Jack Slater. A magic ticket transports the boy into the film, where he helps his hero chase the baddie, who in turn breaks through the screen to wreak havoc in real-life, with the help of an evil sidekick.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: The heartwarming adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 644km journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into the middle of Central Park, but they must find a way back before he tracks them down.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy
programme.desc: Basketball champion LeBron James goes on an epic adventure with Bugs Bunny in this transformational journey of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: A tale which follows the adventures of a wild and rambunctious mustang stallion as he journeys through the untamed American frontiers, encountering man for the first time, Spirit defies being broken, even as he develops a remarkable friendship with a young Lakota brave named Little Creek. The young stallion also finds love with a beautiful paint mare named Rain on his way to becoming one of the greatest unsung heroes of the Old West.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy suburban neighbourhood surrounded by white picket fences and flowering rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. Unbeknownst to the neighbours, hidden deep beneath this home is a vast secret hideout belonging to Gru, a dastardly villain who, along with the help of his many little minions, is planning the biggest heist in the history of the world: he's going to steal the moon!

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A street kid caught vandalising an aquarium bonds with a mighty killer whale while cleaning up his graffiti. When he learns that the orca is worth more dead than alive, he risks everything to free it.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family voyage on a luxury monster cruise ship so he can take a summer vacation from providing everyone else's vacation at the hotel, and the rest of Drac's Pack cannot resist tagging along. The monsters are all having a great time, indulging in all of the shipboard fun the cruise has to offer, from monster volleyball to colossus sized buffets and exotic excursions, but then the unexpected happens as Drac falls for the intriguing-yet-dangerous captain of the ship. Balancing family, friends, and a budding romance might just be too much, even for the most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure Daddy Day Camp secures its rightful place in kid camp history.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Dora's Dance to the Rescue
programme.desc: Put on your dancing shoes, because Dora needs you to spin, shake wiggle, jump and clap with her as she tries to rescue Swiper the fox, who's been trapped inside a bottle by a mean dancing elf.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: While the chickens on evil Mrs Tweedy's farm dream of a better life, a clever hen named Ginger is hatching plans to fly the coop for good. The only problem is, chickens can't fly or can they? Every escape attempt goes fowl until Rocky, a smooth-talking All-American rooster, crash-lands into the coop. It's hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her fine feathered friends to fly but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom! Featuring unforgettable characters, incredible animation and all-star voice talent, this instant classic from the academy Award-winning creators of Wallace & Gromit is eggs-traordinary fun for the whole family!

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: He knows no fear. He knows no danger. He knows nothing! When the priceless Crown Jewels are stolen, bumbling Johnny English is the only secret agent in the country who can solve the crime. His prime suspects: a sinister businessman and a beautiful woman with a mysterious interest in Johnny's top-secret mission. Can the clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Horace Nebbercracker is the meanest man in town, heaven forbid anything that lands on his lawn or he'll snatch it away forever. DJ's obsession with spying on the creepy house across the street has made him a bit of an outcast, but he's determined to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a London museum guard sent to Los Angeles in charge of a priceless painting. Mayhem erupts when the famously eccentric simpleton is mistaken for an art expert.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: Pubert, the Addams' new baby, is in danger of being sabotaged by Wednesday and Puggsley, until Morticia and Gomez hire a nanny, Debbie, who marries Fester and tries to murder him for his money.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: A talented young getaway driver relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. When he meets the girl of his dreams, Baby sees a chance to ditch his criminal life and make a clean getaway. But after being coerced into working for a crime boss, he must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: A French drug kingpin offers a huge reward to anyone who can break him out of jail and only the LAPD's Special Weapons and Tactics team can prevent it.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is a broken man after he loses everything including his job and fiancee. Just when his life is at its lowest, he becomes host to an alien symbiote which results in extraordinary superpowers - transforming him into Venom. Will these powers be enough for this new lethal protector to defeat great evil forces, especially against the far stronger and more weaponized symbiote rival, Riot?

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of a team of unlikely underdogs - a struggling working-class gamer, a failed former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive. Together, they risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world. Gran Turismo is an inspiring, thrilling, and action-packed story that proves that nothing is impossible when you're fuelled from within.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: Ever since their saga started on the streets of L.A's underground racing scene, Dom Toretto and his family have overcome impossible odds to outsmart, out-nerve and out-drive every foe. Yet when the team took down a nefarious kingpin back in Brazil, they had no idea his son Dante was watching from the shadows. More lethal than any other enemy they've faced, Dante now rises as a terrifying new nemesis who's fueled by revenge and determined to shatter their family and destroy everything and everyone Dom loves. From London and Brazil to Antarctica and Rome, new alliances are forged and old enemies resurface. But everything changes after Dom discovers his 8-year-old son is Dante's ultimate target.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: When an unknown caller puts a bomb in Matt Turner's car, he must complete a series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat, he races to save his family.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: After his Master dies unexpectedly, a Medieval squire decides to disguise himself as a knight and sets out to prove himself at the country's jousting competition.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
